title: Denys's Optimizer
description: A basic optimization pack to make the game run better.
body:
This modpack aims to improve performance on all hardware, and generally improve the experience.

This contains mods from popular modpacks such as [Simply Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/sop), [Fabuously Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fabulously-optimized), and other modpacks.

I have built this modpack with the players in mind. As I test my modpack versions on various hardware (Including office PCs.) 

I will try my best to keep this updated as much as possible.

Please submit any issues to this [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/CRm3ygDe9k)

All the best, 

Denys.

[Although this modpack is designed to increase preformance, I do not guarantee that it will do that on some hardware. If the pack does not function as intended, please contact me.]
